title: Celebration Europe (2007)
content:
{{Top|real}} {{Otheruses|Celebration Europe}} {{OOU_event |image=[[File:Celebration_Europe.jpg|thumb|right|250px]] |name=Celebration Europe |host=[[Lucasfilm]] |location= |start date=[[July 13]]{{ThisWeek|EU-glArwz-U|The Bad Batch Returns, Your Photos of The Child, and More!}}–[[July 15|15]], [[2007]]{{SWArchive|url=community/event/celebration/news20070601.html|text=Billy Dee Williams Heads First Celebration Europe Guest List}} |end date= |type= |series= |preceded by=[[Celebration IV]] |followed by=[[Celebration Japan (2008)]] }} '''Celebration Europe''' is a fan convention which was held at the [[Wikipedia:ExCeL Exhibition Centre|ExCeL Exhibition Centre]] in [[Wikipedia:London|London]] from [[July 13]] to [[July 15]] [[2007]]. It was the first Celebration event to be held outside the United States. Its purpose was to primarily celebrate the 30th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], the original ''Star Wars'' film which debuted on [[May 25]], [[1977]]. [[Warwick Davis]] was the Celebrity Master of Ceremonies. Celebration Europe shared many of the features of [[Celebration IV]], which was held in [[Wikipedia:Los Angeles, California|Los Angeles, California]] earlier in the year. The convention was presented by [[Lucasfilm]] and managed by [[The Cards Inc. Group]]. It was also notable for bringing in a replica of the [[Intergalactic Passport (real-life artifact)|Intergalactic Passports]] that were originally issued as backstage passes for the filming of ''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back''. They included 10 collectable stamps, each acquired from specific events in the showing. ==Development== On [[September 25]], [[2006]], StarWars.com posted [http://www.starwars.com/community/event/celebration/news20060925.html an official announcement] regarding Celebration Europe. ==Events== ===Star Wars Celebrities=== *[[Jeremy Bulloch]] ([[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], [[Jeremoch Colton/Legends|Jeremoch Colton]]) *[[Daniel Logan]] (Boba Fett) *[[Temuera Morrison]] ([[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]) *[[Ray Park]] ([[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]) *[[David Prowse|Dave Prowse]] ([[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]) *[[Anthony Daniels]] ([[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]) The above were present at the exhibition on all three days. *[[Mark Hamill]] ([[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]) {{C|Signed autographs in the Celebration Europe Autograph Hall on Friday and Saturday only}} *[[Ian McDiarmid]] ([[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]) {{C|Made a rare public appearance at Star Wars Celebration Europe on Friday, 13th July to help commemorate the Saga's 30th anniversary.}} *[[Rick McCallum]] (Producer) *[[Billy Dee Williams]] ([[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]) *[[Christian Simpson]] ([[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin's]] Double, [[BD-3000 luxury droid/Legends|BD-3000]]){{WebCite|url=https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/u/3641089/Pictures/Celebration%20Europe%20Brochure.jpg|text=Celebration Europe 2007 Show Guide|nobackup=1}} *[[David Barclay]] ([[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] puppeteer) *[[Sean Crawford]] ([[Saelt-Marae/Legends|Yak Face]] and [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] officer, ''Return of the Jedi'') *[[Dermot Crowley]] ([[Crix Madine/Legends|General Crix Madine]]) *[[Tim Dry]] ([[J'Quille/Legends|J'Quille]] and Mon Calamari) *[[Mike Edmonds]] ([[Logray/Legends|Logray]] the Ewok and Jabba the Hutt puppeteer) *[[Barrie Holland]] (Imperial Officer) *[[Ian Liston]] (Lt. [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] and [[Vehicle Command Crewer|AT-AT Driver]]) *[[Matt Sloan]] ([[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]) *[[Danny Wagner]] ([[Mawhonic/Legends|Mawhonic]], ILM Model Maker) ===Celebration Europe Opening Ceremonies and A New Hope screening=== During the informal opening ceremonies, hosted by Steve Sansweet, kicked of the celebration and introduced special guests Including Mark Hamill and Ian McDiarmid, who made a rare public appearance and talked about his experience as [[Palpatine/Legends|the Emperor of the Galaxy]]. McDiarmid also announced [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. ===Star Wars Collecting Panels=== [[File:Celebration_Europe_program_cover.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Celebration Europe program cover]] *Spanish Star Wars Collectibles *Collecting 101 *Mexican Star Wars Collectibles *Autograph Collecting *Women's Collecting Panel *Australian Star Wars Collectibles *Hilarious Star Wars Items *Danish Star Wars Collectibles *Swedish Star Wars Collectibles *Bootleg Star Wars Toys *Canadian Star Wars Collectibles *Dutch Star Wars Collectibles *Star Wars Food Collectibles *French Meccano to European Trilogo *Japanese Star Wars Collectibles *Props and Costumes *Star Wars Tattoos *Trading Cards *Unproduced Star Wars Toys *International Collecting Panel ===R2-D2 Builders=== *Droid Displays & Demonstrations *Droid Races, Trivia Challenge, and XXtreme Droid Competition *Droid Building Panels ===Celebration Europe Art Show=== At artists' Alley in the ExCeL Exhibition Centre, visitors could browse though the works of more than 20 artists. Each artist offered a limited edition print inspired by the thirtieth anniversary that was only available at Celebration Europe. They also offered a number of other prints. Each limited edition print is limited to only 250 pieces world wide. The artists included: *[[Steven D. Anderson]] *[[Matt Busch]] *[[Joe Corroney]] *[[Cynthia Narcisi|Cynthia Cummens]] *[[Dave Dorman]] *[[Adam Hughes]] *[[JAKe]] *[[Terese Nielsen]] *[[Cat Staggs]] *[[Allison Sohn]] *[[Ken Steacy]] *[[Chris Trevas]] *[[Jerry Vanderstelt]] *[[Russell Walks]] *[[Brent Woodside]] *[[Marc Wolfe]] *[[Tommy Lee Edwards]] *[[Tom Hodges]] *[[Randy Martinez]] *[[Monte Moore]] *[[Jason Palmer]] *[[Brian Rood]] *[[Tsuneo Sanda]] ===The One Man Star Wars Trilogy=== Fans of the Star Wars movies and fans of live theater could enjoy an exceptional treat when [[The One Man Star Wars Trilogy|Charles Ross]] performed ''[[The One Man Star Wars Trilogy]]'' in the specially constructed 2000 seat theater in the main halls at Celebration Europe. The Canadian actor delighted audiences daily at London's ExCel Exhibition Center from Friday July 13th through Sunday, July 15th. ===Lawrence Noble sculpting=== [[Lawrence Noble]], the artist who sculpted the statue of [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] on display at [[Lucasfilm Ltd.|Lucasfilm's]] [[Letterman Digital Arts Center]], created a life-size bust of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]]. He sculpted all three days of the event, but took regular breaks.''Celebration Europe Show Guide'' ===Schedule=== '''Celebrity stage''' {| {{Prettytable}} ! Time !! Friday, July 13 !! Saturday, July 14 !! Sansweet]] and [[Pete Vilmur]]. || The Modelmakers. || Star Wars Vintage Toy charity auction
to benefit Make-A-Wish. |- | '''15:30 - 17:00''' || [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed|''The Force Unleashed'']] with LucasArts. || Star Wars Tattoo Competition. || Working with Walking Carpets. |- | '''17:00 - 18:00''' || What's New at Hasbro Toys. || || |- | '''17:30 - 20:00''' || || [[Wikipedia:Fanboys (film)|Fanboys]] Rough Cut Sneak Peak || |} ==Sources== {{ScrollBox|content= *{{SWArchive|url=community/event/celebration/news20070601.html|text=Billy Dee Williams Heads First Celebration Europe Guest List}} *{{SWArchive|url=community/event/celebration/news20070607b.html|text=Your Band -- The Celebration Europe Cantina Band?}} *{{SWArchive|url=community/event/celebration/news20070607.html|text=Producer Rick McCallum at Celebration Europe!}} *{{SWArchive|url=community/event/celebration/news20070611b.html|text=Are You George Lucas?
